settings.heading: Celebrate New Year’s Eve at The Londoner Hotel

settings.text:
Welcome to an enchanting New Year's Eve Masquerade Ball and After Party at The Londoner Hotel, hosted by Luxury London Events. Situated in the heart of London's vibrant Leicester Square, this premier venue will be the backdrop for our exquisite Masquerade Ball.

Launch of a Prestigious Event

We are thrilled to launch the first edition of our legendary New Year's Eve event at The 5-star Londoner Hotel on 31st December 2024 (previously held at The Dorchester, Park Lane Hilton and The Sheraton).

This grand celebration promises to be an unforgettable experience, combining elegance, excitement, and glamour in one of London’s most iconic locations set over three floors for 700 guests.

Immerse Yourself in Elegance

Bid farewell to 2024 and welcome 2025 in style at our grand event. Enjoy an evening of live music, captivating entertainment, and a sophisticated atmosphere. The night begins with a Moet Champagne and canapé reception, setting the stage for the festivities with entertainment, exhilarating performances and music throughout the night. Plus, Live stream of the Big Ben countdown and fireworks on 4x6m screens in the Ballroom.

Delectable Dining and Exclusive Drinks

Experience a lavish banquet in the ballroom curated by The Londoner's renowned culinary team. During dinner service, guests can enjoy free-flowing red and white house wine, concluding once dessert has been served.

For an elevated experience, upgrade to our Premium Gold Dinner package, which includes dedicated waiter table service for the duration of the evening and premium seating near the dance floor. Premium Gold dinner guests also have access to a open bar with house wines, premium spirits, beers, and soft drinks during dinner service (concluding once the dessert has been served).

Ticket Options:

Gold Tickets starting from £395

Platinum Tickets starting from £525

VIP After Party Tickets starting from £145

Event Highlights

  • Doors Open: 19:00, Last Entry: 00:00, Party Ends: 02:30
  • Location: The Londoner Hotel, Leicester Square, London, WC2H 7DX
  • Capacity: 700 guests across three stunning floors – The Green Room, The Ballroom, and The Gallery
  • Entertainment: Live performances, entertainment, and DJ sets. Live stream of the Big Ben countdown and fireworks on 4x6m screens in the Ballroom
  • Accommodation: Hotel Rooms available on request with a 21% Discount

Secure Your Spot

Don’t miss out on one of London’s most coveted New Year’s Eve Masquerade Gala Dinners and After Party. Join us to toast to new beginnings and the dawn of 2025 in unforgettable style at The exclusive 5 Star Londoner Hotel.

Thank You For Celebrating New Year's Eve at The Londoner with Luxury London Events!
